description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker with a predominantly off-white mesh upper and a textured, slightly dirty appearance, suggesting regular use. The shoe features a rounded toe, a thick, patterned rubber sole, and a reinforced heel area in a darker gray color. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with flat laces, and the tongue displays a triangular logo patch. The heel tab is also gray and includes two horizontal white stripes, likely for branding or design. The overall silhouette is low-cut, providing ankle mobility, and the shoe appears lightweight and breathable, suitable for urban walking or casual sports activities.
description: A lightly worn, off-white athletic sneaker with a mesh upper, gray heel accents, and standard lacing. The shoe features a thick, textured sole and visible branding elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, mesh texture, and lacing system with the logo patch on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the shoe's profile, mesh upper, thick sole, and the transition to the gray heel area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the gray heel tab with two white horizontal stripes and the reinforced heel structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mesh upper, lacing, and the thick, textured sole.
attribute_logo: triangular patch on tongue, two horizontal white stripes on gray heel tab
